args.content: Fast-track fix completed. Root cause confirmed in sidepanel current-run in-memory runEvents append path: replayed SSE events were appended without id/sequence dedupe, allowing duplicate THINKING content in the live panel. Implemented localized dedupe/replacement on event ingress in extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx and added targeted App tests covering identical replay and same-sequence fuller snapshot behavior. Verified with extension typecheck and targeted Vitest tests for the new scenarios.

args.content: Establish baseline for the Google plugin AI web assistant duplicate reasoning remediation. Strategy: stable normalized event semantics and single-display reasoning UX. Business: users must see each reasoning emission once in the active session and history. Application: python adapter normalization, shared extension event contract, sidepanel reasoning projection, live run state handling, and conversation rendering. Technology: Python adapter SSE ingestion, browser EventSource streaming, Chrome sidepanel runtime, and automated pytest/vitest validation.

documentation.value: Describe the element as a goal: a high-level end state or outcome that stakeholders intend to achieve. In this architecture, Product Delivery Goal defines the intended strategic outcome for 修复当前会话过程中 THINKING 框出现重复 reasoning 文本的问题，确保 reasoning 内容不会被重复追加或重复渲染。 and anchors the rest of the baseline intention model. Establish baseline for the Google plugin AI web assistant duplicate reasoning remediation. Strategy: stable normalized event semantics and single-display reasoning UX. Business: users must see each reasoning emission once in the active session and history. Application: python adapter normalization, shared extension event contract, sidepanel reasoning projection, live run state handling, and conversation rendering. Technology: Python adapter SSE ingestion, browser EventSource streaming, Chrome sidepanel runtime, and automated pytest/vitest validation.

Describe the element as a capability: an ability that an organization, person, or system possesses to achieve an outcome. In this architecture, Core Product Capability captures the organization or product's capacity to achieve 修复当前会话过程中 THINKING 框出现重复 reasoning 文本的问题，确保 reasoning 内容不会被重复追加或重复渲染。 through coordinated business and application behavior.

Describe the element as a course of action: an approach, directive, or plan for configuring capabilities and resources. In this architecture, MVP Delivery Course Of Action prescribes a runnable local MVP with explicit architecture-to-implementation traceability as the preferred means of delivery.

Describe the element as a business actor: an organizational entity that is capable of performing behavior and owning or using business roles, processes, or services. In this architecture, Primary User identifies the main human or organizational party that consumes the delivered business service and interacts with the core business flow.

Describe the element as a business process: a sequence of business behavior that produces a defined set of business outcomes. In this architecture, Core Business Flow sequences the core activities needed to operationalize 修复当前会话过程中 THINKING 框出现重复 reasoning 文本的问题，确保 reasoning 内容不会被重复追加或重复渲染。 and deliver the intended value to the primary user.

Describe the element as a business service: externally visible business behavior delivered to customers or other business roles. In this architecture, Core User Service is the user-facing service delivered through the core business process to the primary actor.

Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Core Application System is the modular software building block that automates and supports the business process behind 修复当前会话过程中 THINKING 框出现重复 reasoning 文本的问题，确保 reasoning 内容不会被重复追加或重复渲染。.

Describe the element as an application service: externally visible automated behavior provided by an application component. In this architecture, Core Application Service provides the externally visible automation boundary that supports and serves the core business service.

Describe the element as a data object: passive data suitable for automated processing by application behavior. In this architecture, Core Domain Data captures the domain and state information created, read, and maintained by the core application system.

Describe the element as a node: a computational or physical resource that hosts, executes, or supports technology and application behavior. In this architecture, Core Technology Runtime is the runtime environment that hosts and executes the technology and application behavior required for 修复当前会话过程中 THINKING 框出现重复 reasoning 文本的问题，确保 reasoning 内容不会被重复追加或重复渲染。.

Describe the element as an artifact: a physical or deployable piece of information used or produced in technology or application realization. In this architecture, Deployable Solution Artifact is the deployable solution package generated from the core application system for operation on the target runtime node.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, Core Product Capability makes Product Delivery Goal concrete by providing the ability needed to achieve that strategic outcome.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, MVP Delivery Course Of Action gives concrete form to Core Product Capability by prescribing how that capability will be established.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, Core Business Flow operationalizes Core Product Capability through executable business behavior.

Describe the relationship as an assignment: the allocation of responsibility, behavior, or execution from an active structure element to a behavior element, or vice versa where appropriate in ArchiMate. In this architecture, Primary User is allocated participation responsibility in Core Business Flow from a business perspective.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, Core Business Flow implements and makes Core User Service concrete as externally visible behavior.

Describe the relationship as a serving relationship: the source concept provides functionality or value that is used by the target concept. In this architecture, Core User Service provides business value and externally visible behavior to Primary User.

Describe the relationship as a serving relationship: the source concept provides functionality or value that is used by the target concept. In this architecture, Core Application Service provides the automated support needed by the business-facing Core User Service.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, Core Application System implements and makes Core Application Service concrete as the exposed application service boundary.

Describe the relationship as an access relationship: the source behavior or active structure concept reads, writes, or otherwise uses the target passive structure concept. In this architecture, Core Application System reads and writes Core Domain Data in order to execute application behavior.

Describe the relationship as an association: a generic structural or semantic link used when no more specific ArchiMate relationship type applies. In this architecture, Core Technology Runtime has a structural support link with Core Application System where no more specific baseline relationship is modeled.

Describe the relationship as a serving relationship: the source concept provides functionality or value that is used by the target concept. In this architecture, Core Technology Runtime provides the infrastructure behavior required to host and expose Core Application Service.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, Deployable Solution Artifact is the concrete deployable manifestation of Core Application System.
Core layered intention model maintained by SystemArchitect.

args.content: Full-model baseline for duplicate THINKING text remediation: move root-cause control to the normalized event contract and reasoning projection boundary. Extend existing brownfield modules rather than creating new software units. Python adapter normalization must emit stable semantic metadata for reasoning/text emissions; extension shared protocol/api must validate that contract; reasoningTimeline.ts becomes the single read-model/projection authority that merges reasoning by semantic identity and separates assistant body text from Thinking process items; App.tsx remains limited to transport replay dedupe and lifecycle state; reasoningTimelineView.tsx is reduced to pure rendering with only light display sanitization. Fast-track commit 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871 is retained as a completed transport-level fix but is insufficient for the semantic duplicate root cause.

result.designSummary: Full-model baseline for duplicate THINKING text remediation: move root-cause control to the normalized event contract and reasoning projection boundary. Extend existing brownfield modules rather than creating new software units. Python adapter normalization must emit stable semantic metadata for reasoning/text emissions; extension shared protocol/api must validate that contract; reasoningTimeline.ts becomes the single read-model/projection authority that merges reasoning by semantic identity and separates assistant body text from Thinking process items; App.tsx remains limited to transport replay dedupe and lifecycle state; reasoningTimelineView.tsx is reduced to pure rendering with only light display sanitization. Fast-track commit 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871 is retained as a completed transport-level fix but is insufficient for the semantic duplicate root cause.

args.content: Brownfield fit decision: extend existing modules python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py, python_adapter/app/models.py, extension/src/shared/protocol.ts, extension/src/shared/api.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx, and their tests. Do not create a new standalone reasoning service or duplicate event store because the repository already has clear ownership seams for normalization, contract validation, projection, live state, and rendering.

decisions: Brownfield fit decision: extend existing modules python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py, python_adapter/app/models.py, extension/src/shared/protocol.ts, extension/src/shared/api.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx, and their tests. Do not create a new standalone reasoning service or duplicate event store because the repository already has clear ownership seams for normalization, contract validation, projection, live state, and rendering.

args.content: Architectural decision: normalized event contract is the primary fix locus. Transport replay dedupe in App.tsx remains necessary but cannot resolve semantic duplicates where one reasoning emission is normalized into multiple thinking events. Projection logic in reasoningTimeline.ts must consume stable semantic metadata and become the single authority for merging reasoning snapshots and deltas.

decisions: Brownfield fit decision: extend existing modules python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py, python_adapter/app/models.py, extension/src/shared/protocol.ts, extension/src/shared/api.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx, and their tests. Do not create a new standalone reasoning service or duplicate event store because the repository already has clear ownership seams for normalization, contract validation, projection, live state, and rendering.

Architectural decision: normalized event contract is the primary fix locus. Transport replay dedupe in App.tsx remains necessary but cannot resolve semantic duplicates where one reasoning emission is normalized into multiple thinking events. Projection logic in reasoningTimeline.ts must consume stable semantic metadata and become the single authority for merging reasoning snapshots and deltas.

args.content: Architectural decision: reasoningTimelineView.tsx must stop owning semantic dedupe. Any existing near-duplicate trimming in the render layer should be minimized to display sanitization only, so that live and history views rely on the same projection semantics and defects remain visible at the correct architectural layer.

decisions: Brownfield fit decision: extend existing modules python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py, python_adapter/app/models.py, extension/src/shared/protocol.ts, extension/src/shared/api.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx, and their tests. Do not create a new standalone reasoning service or duplicate event store because the repository already has clear ownership seams for normalization, contract validation, projection, live state, and rendering.

Architectural decision: normalized event contract is the primary fix locus. Transport replay dedupe in App.tsx remains necessary but cannot resolve semantic duplicates where one reasoning emission is normalized into multiple thinking events. Projection logic in reasoningTimeline.ts must consume stable semantic metadata and become the single authority for merging reasoning snapshots and deltas.

Architectural decision: reasoningTimelineView.tsx must stop owning semantic dedupe. Any existing near-duplicate trimming in the render layer should be minimized to display sanitization only, so that live and history views rely on the same projection semantics and defects remain visible at the correct architectural layer.

args.title: Opencode Event Normalizer
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Opencode Event Normalizer encapsulates the Python adapter logic that converts opencode SSE payloads into normalized run events with stable semantic metadata for reasoning, tool, question, result, and error emissions.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Opencode Event Normalizer encapsulates the Python adapter logic that converts opencode SSE payloads into normalized run events with stable semantic metadata for reasoning, tool, question, result, and error emissions.

args.title: Extension Stream Contract
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Extension Stream Contract owns the shared TypeScript protocol and runtime schema validation for normalized run events consumed by the browser extension.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Extension Stream Contract owns the shared TypeScript protocol and runtime schema validation for normalized run events consumed by the browser extension.

args.title: Reasoning Projection Mapper
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Reasoning Projection Mapper builds the read-model for Thinking, assistant body text, questions, and result/error turns from normalized run events and is the single authority for semantic merge behavior.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Reasoning Projection Mapper builds the read-model for Thinking, assistant body text, questions, and result/error turns from normalized run events and is the single authority for semantic merge behavior.

args.title: Live Run State Orchestrator
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Live Run State Orchestrator owns current-session event ingress, transport-level replay deduplication, run lifecycle state transitions, and background state synchronization for the sidepanel.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Live Run State Orchestrator owns current-session event ingress, transport-level replay deduplication, run lifecycle state transitions, and background state synchronization for the sidepanel.

args.title: Conversation Renderer
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Conversation Renderer renders the projected assistant conversation, Thinking panel, and interaction affordances from the read-model supplied by the projection mapper without reinterpreting event semantics.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Conversation Renderer renders the projected assistant conversation, Thinking panel, and interaction affordances from the read-model supplied by the projection mapper without reinterpreting event semantics.

args.title: Normalizer serves contract
args.content: Describe the relationship as a serving relationship: the source concept provides functionality or value that is used by the target concept. In this architecture, Opencode Event Normalizer provides the normalized event payloads and semantic metadata consumed by Extension Stream Contract.

tasks.title: Implement normalized event contract metadata for reasoning and assistant text emissions
tasks.summary: Extend python_adapter/app/models.py and python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py so normalized events carry stable semantic metadata (such as projection channel, emission kind, and message/part identity) that distinguishes reasoning process events from assistant body text and allows same-semantic reasoning emissions to be merged downstream without weak text heuristics.

tasks.title: Adopt the extended normalized event contract in extension shared protocol and SSE schema validation
tasks.summary: Update extension/src/shared/protocol.ts and extension/src/shared/api.ts to model and validate the new normalized event metadata, preserving compatibility for null/optional fields while ensuring the sidepanel receives stable semantics from the adapter.

tasks.title: Refactor reasoningTimeline projection to merge Thinking by semantic identity instead of view-layer text dedupe
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts so buildReasoningTimelineItems, assistant response aggregation, and chat stream mapping consume semantic metadata, merge reasoning delta/snapshot events into a single Thinking projection, and keep assistant body text separate from process items with text similarity used only as a compatibility fallback.

tasks.title: Constrain App live run state handling to transport replay dedupe and lifecycle updates
tasks.summary: Keep extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx focused on current-run event ingress, event.id/(runId, sequence) replay dedupe, and lifecycle synchronization while removing any pressure to perform semantic reasoning dedupe in the live state layer. Treat fast-track commit 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871 as retained but insufficient prior work.

tasks.title: Reduce renderer duplicate-handling logic so Thinking rendering depends on projected read-model semantics
tasks.summary: Update extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx to consume already-projected Thinking items, keeping only light display sanitization and removing semantic duplicate resolution from the render layer so live and history views share the same projection behavior.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for normalized contract, projection merge, renderer scope, and current-session duplicate prevention
tasks.summary: Expand python_adapter/tests/test_opencode_adapter.py, extension/src/shared/api.test.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts, and extension/src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx to cover same-semantic reasoning emitted as delta plus snapshot, assistant text stream separation, view-model-only Thinking dedupe, renderer no-longer-owning semantic dedupe, and live current-session regressions.

args.content: Audit passed for commit 525290be0b9f29b365352c7f01e037c82d922ae5. Implementation aligns with approved duplicate-thinking remediation intent: normalized event contract carries semantic reasoning/assistant_text metadata in python_adapter/app/models.py and python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py; extension shared protocol/api validate and consume the contract in extension/src/shared/protocol.ts and extension/src/shared/api.ts; reasoningTimeline.ts is the single projection/read-model authority for semantic merge, assistant/result separation, and process-item dedupe; App.tsx is constrained to replay dedupe, lifecycle state, and final result persistence; reasoningTimelineView.tsx is reduced to display-only sanitization without semantic cross-item dedupe. Explicit ArchitectureID evidence exists for ELM-APP-008C, ELM-APP-EXT-SHARED-API-CONTRACT, ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-CONVERSATION-MAPPER, and ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-RENDERER, with repository-level evidence for ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-ORCHESTRATION. Regression tests cover semantic contract adoption, projection merge behavior, renderer scope, and current-session replay handling.

args.content: QA failed for commit 525290be0b9f29b365352c7f01e037c82d922ae5. Targeted adapter tests passed (PYTHONPATH=. pytest python_adapter/tests/test_opencode_adapter.py), targeted projection/schema tests passed (extension vitest: src/shared/api.test.ts, src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts), focused duplicate-regression App tests passed, and extension typecheck passed. However the broader touched-module App regression suite failed (13 failures in src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx), including current-session/history/status UI regressions and follow-up/session actions. Repository HEAD matches reviewed commit but worktree is dirty, so results should be interpreted with that caveat.

args.content: Audit passed for commit 9f1673248fe60b9a107cde5fe15b0aace5ec518d. Regression repair remains aligned with approved duplicate-thinking architecture. The normalized event contract and shared schema ownership remain unchanged in adapter/protocol layers; reasoningTimeline.ts still owns projection semantics, including assistant body derivation, generic streaming placeholder generation, and Thinking visibility policy; App.tsx changes restore session/history/lifecycle shell behavior without reintroducing semantic dedupe or projection authority; reasoningTimelineView.tsx remains render-only with display sanitization and stable keys, not semantic merge logic. Architecture trace evidence for TASK-002..TASK-007 remains present, and updated tests validate generic streaming progress, mixed reasoning/body rendering, and restored sidepanel session behavior.

args.content: Release completed for THINKING duplicate reasoning fix. Goal: 修复 THINKING 框重复 reasoning 文本问题。 Key commits: baseline 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871, full-model implementation 525290be0b9f29b365352c7f01e037c82d922ae5, final validated QA retry fix 9f1673248fe60b9a107cde5fe15b0aace5ec518d. Completed scope: TASK-002..TASK-007. Validation: QA passed, Audit passed. Release log path: /mnt/d/projects/googlepluginForAiwebassistant/SprintRleaseLog.md.
